## Plot Catalog Status

Machine-readable summary: [plot_catalog_status.csv](../data/derived/effect_inflation_dataset/plot_catalog_status.csv)

::: {.dataset-table .dataset-status-table}

| Plot | Catalog maturity | Included | Support-only | Considered out | Main missing piece |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Plot 1 — Replication Pairs | mature audit | 57 | 1 | 29 | Resolve the remaining raw/staged lead families by parser, metric-conversion, access, or native-metric-lane decision. |
| Plot 2 — Published Paper Endpoints | source audit built | 26 | 0 | 9 | Add source-specific collapse-rule prose and resolve high-yield excluded candidates by parser, access, or policy decision. |
| Plot 3 — Preregistered Results | first figure / partial audit | 10 | 0 | 31 | Expand the considered-source sweep and add a formal preregistered-source evidence inventory. |
| Plot 4 — All-Source D/N Dump | first-pass surface map | 4 | 1 | 1 | Formalize deduplication rules and a native-metric sidecar policy before using this layer inferentially. |

:::
